full_script_line: Hey everyone, my name is Peter.
This is PinProf, a pinball study app with your own personal pinball professor.
source_prep_state: logo or welcome art already framed

full_script_line: This is PinProf, a pinball study app with your own personal pinball professor.
source_prep_state: welcome art or app hero already framed

full_script_line: When you're walking up to a game, sometimes you just want to look something up quickly.
On Jurassic Park, how do you qualify that early extra ball, and where do you collect it?
In Library, you can jump straight to that part of the rules.
source_prep_state: Rulesheet already at the right anchor

full_script_line: see that it takes six rescues
source_prep_state: six rescues line already crisp and centered

full_script_line: and that it's collected at the right ramp.
source_prep_state: right ramp line already crisp and centered

full_script_line: Then you can check the playfield
spot that little extra ball sign
source_prep_state: playfield already framed on the sign

full_script_line: and even watch a gameplay video to see it in action.
With all of this practice you're putting in, you'll want to keep track of it.
If you studied the rules or reviewed the playfield, you can log that.
Recording your scores is easy. You can scan a score right off the machine
source_prep_state: scan flow already framed near freeze moment

full_script_line: and save it in seconds.
You can also build a study group around an upcoming bank of league games.
Look up any machine quickly, review notes
and check the log to see everything you've done for practice in the past.
source_prep_state: game log already open and readable

full_script_line: For owners, PinProf makes it easy to keep track of your personal collection.
You can import your games from Pinside
and organize them by area and position.
Keep track of play count and maintenance, log issues and fixes as they happen
and browse your GameRoom in the Library.
source_prep_state: Library already filtered to Flynn's Arcade

full_script_line: PinProf also connects you to the places you play at
source_prep_state: Settings already open to imports area

phrase_text: bring those games into the Library
full_script_line: You can add your home arcade and bring those games into the Library.
If you play competitively, load in a tournament's arena list with its MatchPlay ID for easy study
source_prep_state: arena list already imported and visible

full_script_line: and quickly check your IFPA profile to see where you stand.
With PinProf, you can easily view league stats at a glance.
Or you can take a deep dive
source_prep_state: stats result already filtered and ready

full_script_line: and see how you did on a game compared to everyone else in that bank or from across all of LPL history.
source_prep_state: standings or comparison table already centered

full_script_line: You can track your growth over the seasons
and use score targets to help plan your next practice session.
I hope PinProf can be my way to give a little back.
Give the app a flip and let me know what you think.
Thanks!
